title: Fast Delivery via AI-Assisted Coding
description: I guide AI in safe, step-by-step edits to write clean code quickly — stable, bug-free, and fast.

title: Clean & Modular Architecture
description: UI stays separate from backend logic, making handovers easy and future updates simple.

title: Security-First Practices
description: I build with defense-in-depth: database-level user isolation, validated inputs, and secure session handling that keeps every user's data locked down.

title: Performance & Optimization
description: Server-side rendering, smart caching, and optimized assets so your app loads in under a second and scores top marks on Lighthouse — out of the box.

title: SEO-First Development
description: I build SEO into every page — dynamic metadata, structured data, and auto-generated sitemaps — so search engines index your content without extra work.

title: Smooth UX & Micro-Animations
description: Fluid user journeys, responsive layouts, and micro-interactions that feel premium and interactive.
